name: Hacienda Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Ranch, creamy garlic, or creamy Italian dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. Toss with mixed green salads, bean salads, or pasta salads.
4. Drizzle over sliced tomatoes, cucumbers, or avocados.
Makes about 1 cup of dressing.
